creator: atara-y@mx.scn.tv
text:
Created attachment 185250
patch

Problem itself has been already reported as bug #203313.
mail/sqwebmail has conflict files with courier-imap, which causes installation failure.

Such conflicts with courier-imap has been already patched in this ports. I made a workaround patch along the way of the existing patch. 


===>   Registering installation for sqwebmail-5.9.0
Installing sqwebmail-5.9.0...
pkg-static: sqwebmail-5.9.0 conflicts with courier-imap-4.18.0,2 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/man/man1/maildirmake.1.gz
*** Error code 70

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/sqwebmail
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/sqwebmail
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/sqwebmail
